description: Payment records for orders. Table name is payment_transactions, not payments.

chunks.text:
TABLE: payment_transactions

DESCRIPTION: Payment records for orders. Table name is payment_transactions, not payments.

NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TERMS: payments, payment transactions, payment records, transactions, payment history, payment processing

PRIMARY_KEY: transaction_id

FOREIGN_KEYS: order_id → orders.order_id

COLUMNS: transaction_id, order_id, payment_method, payment_provider, transaction_date, amount, currency, status, card_last_four, authorization_code, processing_fee

USE_CASES: Payment status, revenue by payment method, failed payment analysis
